stemHtml: An aircraft is flying in the southern hemisphere at low altitude (less than 2000 feet) and going directly away from a centre of low pressure. What direction, relative to the aircraft, does the wind come from?

options.a: From the left and slightly on the nose.
options.b: From the left and slightly on the tail.
options.c: From the right and slightly on the tail.
options.d: From the right and slightly on the nose.
